allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from shelf import shelf; print\('API import OK'\)" && .venv/Scripts/shelf --help | head -5)
Bash(rm -rf "Intro to Statistical Thermodynamics - Molecular Perspective \(Elstner, Cui, Gruden\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/shelf "C:\\Users\\joesa\\OneDrive\\Documents\\law-school-python\\shelf\\textbook-tests\\Intro to Statistical Thermodynamics - Molecular Perspective \(Elstner, Cui, Gruden\).epub")
Bash(mv Intro to Statistical Thermodynamics - Molecular Perspective \(Elstner, Cui, Gruden\):*)

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['python','-m','py_compile',f],capture_output=True,text=True) if f.endswith('.py') else None; r and r.returncode and (sys.stderr.write(r.stderr) or sys.exit(r.returncode))"
